highlights: **InfinoAI Voice AI (Agentic Product):** Engineered a production real-time voice assistant integrating Groq LLaMA 3.3 70B, Whisper STT/TTS, and an agentic intent-routing pipeline; achieved 1–2s end-to-end latency with consistent multi-turn accuracy.
**~40% Inference Cost Reduction (LLMOps):** Architected a 7-category intent routing system that eliminated unnecessary LLM calls, reducing inference costs by ~40% and improving response latency.
**Production Deployment (Docker + Flask + React):** Implemented full voice pipeline and deployed via Dockerized Flask backend with React dashboard.
**Prompt Engineering & Context Management:** Designed structured prompt templates and context window strategies enabling reliable output format consistency and reduced hallucinations.
